title: Nervilia taitoensis
taxonomy: Nervilia taitoensis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to Japan. The genus Nervilia is a small group of orchids, and N. taitoensis is one of the species within this group. N. taitoensis is a rare and endangered species, adding to its limited classification knowledge. Further research on this species is needed to provide a more comprehensive understanding of its classification.
uses: Nervilia taitoensis has been found to possess potential medicinal properties, although its usage is largely unstudied in modern science.  In traditional Asian medicine, certain species of Nervilia have been used to treat various ailments.
